@user1:
https://www.mongodb.com/docs/v4.2/reference/method/db.eval/ Eval is not supported on latest mongodb versions?
results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_mongodb_provider_does_not_use_db_eval_and_uses_command_api__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/keep/providers/mongodb_provider/mongodb_provider.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert '.eval(' not in source, 'MongoDB provider should not use database.eval()/db.eval(), which is removed/unsupported in newer MongoDB versions. Expected code to use database.command(...) instead.'

def test_mongodb_provider_does_not_use_db_eval_and_uses_command_api__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/keep/providers/mongodb_provider/mongodb_provider.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert re.search('\\bdatabase\\.command\\s*\\(', source), 'MongoDB provider should use database.command(...) to execute queries instead of database.eval(...).'
